US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Singles - Gold Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Singles - Gold Medal

Video.summary: Catch all the action from the Women's Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal 1 at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships held in Naples, Florida. This semifinal match features top senior pros Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy facing Jennifer Dawson and Bonnie Williams in a high-stakes contest. Expert commentary highlights key strategies, player strengths, and match dynamics including powerful serves from Ava Welsher, tactical lobs, and intense court positioning. Follow how the players adjust to crowd pressure and timeouts in this best-of-three game format. Get ready for a thrilling showdown in one of pickleball’s premier senior pro events.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Video.summary: Experience the tactical intensity of the World Pickleball League as the Rajasthan Titans look to mount a comeback against the surging Hyderabad Superstars. This episode spotlights a generational clash in the men's singles match between Rajasthan’s Jack Foster and Hyderabad’s Marcelo Jardim, a 51-year-old former world No. 3 in padel and a true legend of racquet sports.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1

Video.summary: The grand finale of the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional Championship, the second of six regionals for the season. The rivalry matchup features the top teams from Utah Valley University and Utah Tech.This broadcast highlights the intense Men's Doubles game, where Utah Tech's star player Liam Duffin—hailed as one of the top collegiate players nationwide—teams up with Clayton Boydston to face Utah Valley's duo of Bryce Larson and Charles Case.The stakes are high: teams are competing for $5,000 in scholarship money and a coveted bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri, where $30,000 is on the line. Ultimately, Utah Tech's first team prevails, taking home the national bid and the Utah Regional title.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Valley vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Valley vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Valley vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Valley vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: The stakes are sky-high in this 2024 National Pickleball League Women’s Doubles Championship as the Coachella Valley Scorpions' dynamic duo, Molly Carter and Kelly Ojeda, take on the formidable Denver Iconics pairing of Stacy Zelenski and Lily Kordic Mueller. Filmed at a championship stop on the NPL tour, this intense match features fierce net battles, pinpoint placement, and relentless energy on both sides of the court. Watch as Carter & Ojeda push the pace and mount a relentless offensive, while Zelenski & Kordic Mueller counter with sharp angles and strategic resets. A hard-fought final that captures the spirit, skill, and teamwork of professional women’s pickleball.
Video.title: NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller

Image.alt: NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller

Video.summary: Catch the exhilarating Men's Pro Doubles match from the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville! Witness incredible action on the Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida, the paradise coast for pickleball. This thrilling match features the dynamic duo of John Cangelosi and Michael Leonard against their formidable opponents. Get ready for intense rallies, powerful shots, and strategic play from top professional pickleball players. Don't miss this must-watch event from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Video.summary: Witness an unexpected and electrifying Mixed Pro Doubles showdown from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida! Originally scheduled for a back court, this highly anticipated match featuring Andre Agassi and Anna Leigh Waters was moved to Championship Court due to overwhelming crowd demand, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Relive every moment as these top players battle it out in a thrilling display of professional pickleball. Don't miss the action from East Naples Community Park – the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Video.summary: Anna Leigh Waters and J.W. Johnson take on Megan Fudge and Andrei Daescu in this Mixed Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.

Matt Lanter and Jason Tartik
Matt Lanter and Jason Tartik

Video.summary: The 2022 Picklebowl offers an unforgettable mixed doubles match featuring some of the biggest names in sports. US Olympian Casey Patterson and pickleball pro Chuck Taylor join forces to take on pickleball standout Megan Fudge and former tennis world No. 5 Kevin Anderson. Set against the scenic backdrop of Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event blends elite pickleball play with charity and college pride. Expect explosive rallies, pinpoint accuracy, and powerful serves in this high-energy exhibition that showcases the crossover appeal of pickleball.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson
Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson
Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson

Video.summary: The US Open took place April 24-30, 2022 in Naples, FL. The Women's Doubles Final was a match up of Catherine Parenteau & Lea Jansen vs. Irina Tereschenko & Andrea Koop.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2022 - Women's Pro Doubles Final

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2022 - Women's Pro Doubles Final
US Open Pickleball Championships 2022 - Women's Pro Doubles Final
US Open Pickleball Championships 2022 - Women's Pro Doubles Final

US Open Pickleball Championships 2021 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden as the high-stakes battle for the top four intensifies between the Hyderabad Superstars and Delhi Dilwale. With legendary co-owner Sunil Gavaskar watching from the sidelines, the Dilwale look to maintain their winning streak against a fiercely aggressive Hyderabad squad known for their wild celebrations and relentless energy. This tie features a series of high-octane clashes, from the strategic precision of Shawn Mendes and Alejandra Lopez in women’s singles to the "grueling" 15-minute sprints of elite doubles play. As the "Band of Honor" leaderboard hangs in the balance, every rally becomes a desperate fight for survival in one of the world's most prestigious pickleball arenas.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1

Video.summary: Witness a battle for survival at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai as two powerhouse teams, the Rajasthan Titans and Pune United, fight to secure their first tie victory of the season. The energy is palpable as Pune United's Katie Morris looks for redemption after a tough opening night, while the Titans rely on the aggressive play of Lorena Dupnik and the "superb power" of volleyball-pro-turned-pickleballer Isabella Nelson. From the intense "grind" of 15-minute singles matches to the high-speed tactical exchanges of men’s and women’s doubles, every point is a step toward climbing the league ladder. Don't miss the strategic masterclasses, including high-stakes challenges and game-changing "Pickle Plays," that keep the Mumbai crowd on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.summary: The stakes reach a boiling point at Mumbai's Jio World Garden as the league-leading Chennai Super Champs face off against the defending champions, the Bengaluru Jawans, in a critical top-of-the-table clash. Witness a masterclass in professional grit as "dominating" stars like Katrina Stewart and tactical veterans like Dusty Boyer battle for supremacy on the road to the semi-finals. From high-velocity "scary" 15-minute singles sprints to intense mixed doubles rallies, every point contributes to the prestigious Band of Honor leaderboard. Experience the strategic drama of game-changing "Pickle Plays" and high-stakes challenges in a tie where one momentum shift could decide who walks away with the top spot in the league.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the electrifying atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden as the Mumbai Pickle Power hunt for their first tie victory of the season against the formidable Hyderabad Superstars. The tension reaches a fever pitch with Hyderabad’s "fireball" Shawn Mendes dominating the singles court, while Mumbai’s Brandon Lane and Santhosh Narayanan aim to turn the tide in the critical doubles matchups. Witness high-risk "Pickle Plays" and strategic substitutions as these athletes battle for precious points on the road to the semi-finals. With both teams fighting for survival on the league leaderboard, every rally is a masterclass in professional grit and tactical brilliance.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2

Video.summary: The atmosphere at Mumbai's Jio World Garden is electric as the host team, Mumbai Pickle Power, rides the momentum of their first season victory into a high-stakes clash against the Rajasthan Titans. With Rajasthan still hunting for their elusive first win of the season, the pressure is at a breaking point for both squads as they fight to climb the "Band of Honor" leaderboard. Witness tactical masterclasses as veteran Lorena Dupnik faces off against Jada Bui in a strategic battle of precision, and feel the intensity of the men's singles where superstars like Brandon Lane and Jack Foster showcase explosive athleticism. From game-changing "Pickle Plays" to high-stakes challenges and the presence of celebrity guests like Rishabh Pant, every rally in this tie is a desperate fight for survival on the road to the semifinals.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1

Video.summary: Step into the electric Jio World Garden in Mumbai for a high-stakes showdown where the road to the playoffs is on the line. Delhi Dilwale enter this tie in second place, looking to solidify their dominance and secure a "Q" next to their name for a guaranteed spot in the semifinals. On the other side, Pune United are fighting for survival, desperately needing a win after finally breaking their season-long drought earlier in the day. Witness intense matchups as tactical veterans like Trang Huynh and Max Mansoor face off against Pune's resilient stars, including the grit of Katie Morris and the power of William Sobeck. In a league where every rally counts toward the "Band of Honor," these athletes must battle both their opponents and the relentless 15-minute clock in a masterclass of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
